source_description: Cross-format validation of statechart spec artifacts (WSD, ALPS, SCXML, smcat, XState JSON). Pluggable validation orchestrator that defines a ValidationRule contract; each format module registers its own cross-format checks. Performs single-format self-consistency (structural validity + AST conformance) and cross-format invariant checks. Collects all failures and returns a structured ValidationReport data structure. Presentation is the CLI's concern.
